how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Research Associate position at IIT Indore is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD degree in Astrophysics with at least one research paper published in a Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal. Expertise in specific areas is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years. There is no mention of minimum age or age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 58,000 per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate position at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send a detailed softcopy of their CV and relevant documents in a single PDF file to the specified email address: [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, meaning the employment is tied to the duration and funding of a specific research project.

faq.question: Q9. Which specific areas of expertise are required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Required expertise includes AstroSat or X-ray astronomy data analysis, knowledge of Black Hole astronomy, and experience with machine learning and related statistical tools.

faq.question: Q10. What is the subject line for the application email?
faq.answer: The subject line for the application email should be "ISRO-BH RA application".
